name: Single parent with children
description: Single person with children earning €50,000 in Berlin — reduced care insurance rate for parents

sources.description: Income tax (€6,942) computed via §32a EStG 2025 Zone 3 formula for zvE=38,809. Social security at 2025 rates with reduced care rate 1.8% for parents in standard states.
sources.notes: Berlin (BE) standard care rate with children: 1.8%. Deductions: Werbungskosten €1,230, Sonderausgaben €36, deductible insurance (pension €4,650 + health €4,375 + care €900) = €9,925. Total deductions €11,191. zvE = 50,000 - 11,191 = 38,809.
